title: pr-should-include-tests: no more CI:DOCS override
body:
CI:DOCS is no more.

Signed-off-by: Ed Santiago <santiago@redhat.com>
```release-note
None
```

comments.body:
[APPROVALNOTIFIER] This PR is **APPROVED** This pull-request has been approved by: *edsantiago* The full list of commands accepted by this bot can be found [here](https://go.k8s.io/bot-commands?repo=containers%2Fpodman). The pull request process is described [here](https://git.k8s.io/community/contributors/guide/owners.md#the-code-review-process)
Needs approval from an approver in each of these files: - ~~[OWNERS](https://github.com/containers/podman/blob/main/OWNERS)~~ [edsantiago] Approvers can indicate their approval by writing `/approve` in a comment Approvers can cancel approval by writing `/approve cancel` in a comment
Ephemeral COPR build failed. @containers/packit-build please check.

Possibly. I would need a thorough review of exceptions, such as .conf files, or `pkg/*/json-and-yaml-and-zip`, and probably add `.s` even though there are no such files today.

Also, in the process of looking into this, I realized you need to add `*.h` to your `changesInclude()`

I'm OOTO today, will think about it more tomorrow. Thanks for the suggestion.

> I realized you need to add *.h to your changesInclude()

I didn't though about .h because I thought all the symbol definitions are done in the go file in the special c comments but looks like you are right we have one .h file. I spin up a PR to add it.
